title: The 3x Payoff of Deep AI Integration

mentions.quoted_text: The chatbot, codenamed Campos, will be embedded deeply into the iPhone, iPad, and Mac operating systems and replace the current Siri interface.
mentions.context_snippet: Bloomberg's Apple insider Mark Gurman reports that Siri will be turned into a ChatGPT-style chatbot codenamed Campos, embedded deeply into Apple devices, replacing the current interface.

facts.fact_value: Siri to become ChatGPT-style chatbot codenamed Campos
Deep integration with iPhone, iPad, Mac OS; accepts speech and text inputs
Driven by custom version of Gemini under Apple-Google partnership

mentions.quoted_text: Siri will be driven by a custom version of Gemini under Apple's new partnership with Google.
mentions.context_snippet: Gurman reports that Siri will be driven by a custom version of Gemini under Apple's new partnership with Google.

facts.fact_value: Custom Gemini model powers new Siri chatbot

mentions.quoted_text: Meta was developing two models. Avocado, a language model that reportedly excels at coding tasks.
mentions.context_snippet: Meta was developing two models: Avocado, a language model excelling at coding tasks, and Mango, a visual model with image and video capabilities.

mentions.quoted_text: Mango, a visual model with image and video capabilities.
mentions.context_snippet: Meta was developing two models: Avocado, a language model excelling at coding tasks, and Mango, a visual model with image and video capabilities.

mentions.quoted_text: The House Oversight Committee has advanced a bill to seize power on chip export controls called the AI Overwatch Act.
mentions.context_snippet: The House Oversight Committee has advanced a bill called the AI Overwatch Act to grant Congress power to review and block chip export licenses, including a two-year ban on NVIDIA's Blackwell chips.

facts.fact_value: Bill grants Congress power to review and block chip export licenses
Two-year ban on export of NVIDIA Blackwell chips included

mentions.quoted_text: The bill includes a two-year ban on the export of NVIDIA's top-of-the-line Blackwell chips.
mentions.context_snippet: The AI Overwatch Act includes a two-year ban on the export of NVIDIA's top-of-the-line Blackwell chips.
mentions.review_reason: NVIDIA Blackwell chips are hardware products but no exact software_product or model type; classified as 'other' conservatively.

mentions.quoted_text: A new PWC survey of CEOs released to coincide with the WEF in Davos showed just 12% of CEOs said AI had delivered both cost and revenue benefits.
mentions.context_snippet: PWC survey of nearly 4,500 CEOs found 12% saw both cost and revenue benefits from AI, while 56% saw no significant financial benefit.

mentions.quoted_text: Workday research found that 37% of the time saved through AI is lost to rework, creating an AI tax on productivity.
mentions.context_snippet: Workday survey found employees spend significant time correcting AI-generated content, losing 37% of AI time savings to rework.

mentions.quoted_text: Section survey found just 3% of employees are using AI proficiently, with 97% being novices or experimenters.
mentions.context_snippet: Section report on AI proficiency shows 3% of employees proficient, 97% novices or experimenters, with many lacking tools or training.

mentions.quoted_text: The Wall Street Journal article titled 'CEOs say AI is making work more efficient, employees tell a different story' was referenced.
mentions.context_snippet: The Wall Street Journal summarized surveys showing a gap between executive and employee perceptions of AI efficiency and impact.

facts.fact_value: CEOs say AI is making work more efficient, employees tell a different story

notes: Classified NVIDIA Blackwell chips as 'other' due to hardware nature and taxonomy constraints.
Included only central organizations and persons relevant to claims or attribution.
Conservative approach taken to avoid over-tagging generic terms or unclear types.
All URLs are from explicit mentions or sponsors; otherwise set to null.
Sentiment labels reflect tone of mention in context, mostly neutral or positive except for product failures or challenges.
